HYDROARC 67/26.
NORWEGIAN SEA.
NORWAY.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING
   2000Z TO 0300Z DAILY 18 THRU 24 MAY
   IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 69-08.00N 015-40.00E, 69-14.00N 015-23.00E,
      69-09.00N 015-10.00E, 69-06.00N 015-36.00E.
   B. 69-48.00N 007-45.00E, 69-23.00N 010-48.00E,
      70-42.00N 012-35.00E, 71-09.00N 009-50.00E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 240400Z MAY 26.
